SWE201c: PRO192 (not applied to the BIT_AI and BA programs)
OJT202: Students attained 90% of the total credits prior to the OJT term (excluding Physical Education and OTP Programs) Students choosing JS combo (Japanese Bridge Engineer) have to pass JPD133
AIP491: - Student must pass Deep Learning (DPL30x). - Pass OJT202 - Pass PMG20x - Pass 60% of total credits of selected combo - Pass 80% of total credits (PHE_COM* and OJT excluded)
EXE401: 1. EXE201 2. Pass On-the-job training 3. Pass 80% of total credits (PHE_COM*, On-the-job training excluded for Vietnamese students, PHE_COM* excluded for intl. students).
